title: Software Update - DFU  - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is suppressed during DFU and should appear on the Home screen after DFU completes and the DFU screen is closed.
steps: Connect a new device that supports onboarding (e.g., Emu, Tern, Osprey).
Observe that the DFU screen appears and DFU begins running.
Note that the onboarding dialog does not appear while DFU is running.
expected: After DFU finishes and the user closes the DFU screen, the onboarding dialog should appear on the Home screen.
